title: Detailed Movement Reworked
author: AzrulPlayz
short_description:
# Detailed Movement v1.3.0

Tired of Mine...
description:
# Detailed Movement v1.3.0

Tired of Minecraft's stiff default animations? Detailed Movement completely transforms your player with smooth, realistic, and highly detailed animations for both first-person and third-person view.

✨ Features
- 🏃 Detailed movement animations (walk, sprint, sneak, jump, fall, land)
- ⚔️ Combat system (attack, spin, throw, trident, spear)
- 🏹 Bow & crossbow animations (charge, hold, shoot)
- 🛡️ Shield block animations (first-person)
- 🌊 Swimming & climbing animations
- 🪂 Elytra flying animations
- 🔄 Smooth item swap animations
- 🍖 Eating animations
- 🛡️ Armor visual support

📋 Requirements
- Minecraft Bedrock Edition 1.26.20+
- Resource Pack only — no behavior pack needed!

📱 Compatibility
- ✅ Android / iOS
- ✅ Windows 10/11
